subcodes.first_line: O thou bewildered and impassioned soul! Will there come a time when thou shalt become renowned in both East and West - thou wandering, disgraceful one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته و سودائی ایا وقتی اید که در شرق و غرب مشهور بشیداای گردی و رسوای
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love as fire
